records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that all?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that all?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that all?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Compared to all your boasting, your skills are average at best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Compared to all your boasting, your skills are average at best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Compared to all your boasting, your skills are average at best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. Says the one who keeps running away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. Says the one who keeps running away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. Says the one who keeps running away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you even taking this seriously, you schemer?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you even taking this seriously, you schemer?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you even taking this seriously, you schemer?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you beforehand. This is discipline, not training.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you beforehand. This is discipline, not training.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you beforehand. This is discipline, not training.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Discipline or disco, like I care
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Discipline or disco, like I care
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Discipline or disco, like I care
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, the papers below me tangled my feet...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, the papers below me tangled my feet...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, the papers below me tangled my feet...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is my Counter ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is my Counter ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is my Counter ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am able to control the CRF to make paper as hard as steel or as soft as rubber.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am able to control the CRF to make paper as hard as steel or as soft as rubber.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am able to control the CRF to make paper as hard as steel or as soft as rubber.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, since the paper can be freely reformed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, since the paper can be freely reformed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, since the paper can be freely reformed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am capable of utilizing it like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am capable of utilizing it like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am capable of utilizing it like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You bunched up some paper... and turned it into a sword...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You bunched up some paper... and turned it into a sword...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You bunched up some paper... and turned it into a sword...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh. How am I supposed to get close to you if you keep cowardly shooting from afar?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh. How am I supposed to get close to you if you keep cowardly shooting from afar?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh. How am I supposed to get close to you if you keep cowardly shooting from afar?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember. This is not cowardice, but my controlling the CRF according to my ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember. This is not cowardice, but my controlling the CRF according to my ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember. This is not cowardice, but my controlling the CRF according to my ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper, I have read everything about you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper, I have read everything about you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper, I have read everything about you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your Counter ability is manifesting an electric chainsaw-like weapon from your Watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your Counter ability is manifesting an electric chainsaw-like weapon from your Watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your Counter ability is manifesting an electric chainsaw-like weapon from your Watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no doubt those blasphemous videos you frequently enjoy acted as a trigger for your Counter ability manifestation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no doubt those blasphemous videos you frequently enjoy acted as a trigger for your Counter ability manifestation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no doubt those blasphemous videos you frequently enjoy acted as a trigger for your Counter ability manifestation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely, the chainsaw's trajectory is roughly aimed at a vital point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely, the chainsaw's trajectory is roughly aimed at a vital point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely, the chainsaw's trajectory is roughly aimed at a vital point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Daring close-quarter combat with physical abilities enhanced by CRF with a chainsaw as your weapon...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daring close-quarter combat with physical abilities enhanced by CRF with a chainsaw as your weapon...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Daring close-quarter combat with physical abilities enhanced by CRF with a chainsaw as your weapon...

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this amount of power, you will have no trouble cutting through the armor of a typical C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this amount of power, you will have no trouble cutting through the armor of a typical C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this amount of power, you will have no trouble cutting through the armor of a typical C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Crud. She's using the paper to deflect my chainsaw's blade...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Crud. She's using the paper to deflect my chainsaw's blade...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Crud. She's using the paper to deflect my chainsaw's blade...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't be able to get her at this rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't be able to get her at this rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't be able to get her at this rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, your use of your ability is too simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, your use of your ability is too simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, your use of your ability is too simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how deadly your attack may be, it is useless if it does not make contact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how deadly your attack may be, it is useless if it does not make contact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how deadly your attack may be, it is useless if it does not make contact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ugh, you're annoying me with all that talk! Do you think we're having a fight with words right now?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ugh, you're annoying me with all that talk! Do you think we're having a fight with words right now?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ugh, you're annoying me with all that talk! Do you think we're having a fight with words right now?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop talking and come at me for real!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop talking and come at me for real!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop talking and come at me for real!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Use your head, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Use your head, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Use your head, Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think about how you should use your ability and how you can use that sawblade to judge the Lord's enemies...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think about how you should use your ability and how you can use that sawblade to judge the Lord's enemies...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think about how you should use your ability and how you can use that sawblade to judge the Lord's enemies...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In real combat, even the slightest hesitation can cost you the loss of someone precious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In real combat, even the slightest hesitation can cost you the loss of someone precious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In real combat, even the slightest hesitation can cost you the loss of someone precious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I suppose in your case...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I suppose in your case...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I suppose in your case...

records.m_Talk_ENG: it would be Sister Nelson. It seemed you two were really close, like real sisters...
records.m_Talk_DEU: it would be Sister Nelson. It seemed you two were really close, like real sisters...
records.m_Talk_FRA: it would be Sister Nelson. It seemed you two were really close, like real sisters...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nelson's under my protection. You're not taking her away from me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nelson's under my protection. You're not taking her away from me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nelson's under my protection. You're not taking her away from me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see a gap.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see a gap.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see a gap.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not reveal your emotions so easily. You are unqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not reveal your emotions so easily. You are unqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not reveal your emotions so easily. You are unqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: CRF is the power to change reality...
records.m_Talk_DEU: CRF is the power to change reality...
records.m_Talk_FRA: CRF is the power to change reality...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If one looks at it with another perspective, it also means the influence that an individual has on the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If one looks at it with another perspective, it also means the influence that an individual has on the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If one looks at it with another perspective, it also means the influence that an individual has on the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, no matter if one is a Counter, it is highly unlikely that their CRF output will change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, no matter if one is a Counter, it is highly unlikely that their CRF output will change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, no matter if one is a Counter, it is highly unlikely that their CRF output will change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what? Are you trying to pick a fight with me over having a lower grade than you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what? Are you trying to pick a fight with me over having a lower grade than you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what? Are you trying to pick a fight with me over having a lower grade than you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are wrong, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are wrong, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are wrong, Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because the human mind is always growing, and stereotypes will eventually be shattered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because the human mind is always growing, and stereotypes will eventually be shattered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because the human mind is always growing, and stereotypes will eventually be shattered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's that supposed to mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's that supposed to mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's that supposed to mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Counter's capability is not all about their CRF output.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Counter's capability is not all about their CRF output.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Counter's capability is not all about their CRF output.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So for now, I urge you to learn, feel, and experience more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So for now, I urge you to learn, feel, and experience more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So for now, I urge you to learn, feel, and experience more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For changing the reality that you will face... is entirely up to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For changing the reality that you will face... is entirely up to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For changing the reality that you will face... is entirely up to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What should I do...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What should I do...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What should I do...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what's going on, but... Sister Luce seemed really upset...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what's going on, but... Sister Luce seemed really upset...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what's going on, but... Sister Luce seemed really upset...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure Sister Looper had something to do with it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure Sister Looper had something to do with it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure Sister Looper had something to do with it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...! Maybe I should go apologize on behalf of Sister Looper like I always do...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...! Maybe I should go apologize on behalf of Sister Looper like I always do...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...! Maybe I should go apologize on behalf of Sister Looper like I always do...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But seeing how furious she looked, I don't think a simple apology will resolve the situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But seeing how furious she looked, I don't think a simple apology will resolve the situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But seeing how furious she looked, I don't think a simple apology will resolve the situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what else should I do? I wish they would stop fighting and get along with each other...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what else should I do? I wish they would stop fighting and get along with each other...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what else should I do? I wish they would stop fighting and get along with each other...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder if there is a good solution to this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder if there is a good solution to this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder if there is a good solution to this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's... a Christmas tree?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's... a Christmas tree?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's... a Christmas tree?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, long time no see, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, long time no see, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, long time no see, Sister Nelson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you were deeply injured from your last sacred mission. Are you now fit to be reinstated?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you were deeply injured from your last sacred mission. Are you now fit to be reinstated?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you were deeply injured from your last sacred mission. Are you now fit to be reinstated?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your concerns, Sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your concerns, Sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your concerns, Sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm all better now. It's all thanks to the blessing of the merciful Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm all better now. It's all thanks to the blessing of the merciful Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm all better now. It's all thanks to the blessing of the merciful Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this tree...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this tree...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this tree...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Christmas is just around the corner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Christmas is just around the corner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Christmas is just around the corner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since everyone at the Investigation Council is busy with sacred missions, I thought I'd bring a bit of holiday spirits to the place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since everyone at the Investigation Council is busy with sacred missions, I thought I'd bring a bit of holiday spirits to the place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since everyone at the Investigation Council is busy with sacred missions, I thought I'd bring a bit of holiday spirits to the place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone should be happy on Christmas, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone should be happy on Christmas, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone should be happy on Christmas, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. Come to think of it, I can't believe it's already that time of the year again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. Come to think of it, I can't believe it's already that time of the year again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. Come to think of it, I can't believe it's already that time of the year again.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Because of the sudden Counterside Effect that erupted last year
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Because of the sudden Counterside Effect that erupted last year
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Because of the sudden Counterside Effect that erupted last year
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Sister Nelson? What
8ks wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Sister Nelson? What
8ks wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Sister Nelson? What
8ks wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, that's it! Christmas!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, that's it! Christmas!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, that's it! Christmas!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought of a brilliant solution to reconcile the two Sisters thanks to you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought of a brilliant solution to reconcile the two Sisters thanks to you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought of a brilliant solution to reconcile the two Sisters thanks to you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The two Sisters? Reconcile? What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The two Sisters? Reconcile? What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The two Sisters? Reconcile? What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you! This, too, must be a blessing from the Lord!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you! This, too, must be a blessing from the Lord!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you! This, too, must be a blessing from the Lord!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, happy holidays! Merry Christmas! There is something that I must attend to, so...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, happy holidays! Merry Christmas! There is something that I must attend to, so...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, happy holidays! Merry Christmas! There is something that I must attend to, so...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Nelson...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Nelson...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Nelson...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's too early to be saying "Merry Christmas"...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's too early to be saying "Merry Christmas"...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's too early to be saying "Merry Christmas"...

root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see a gap.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see a gap.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do not reveal your emotions so easily. You are unqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do not reveal your emotions so easily. You are unqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do not reveal your emotions so easily. You are unqualified to be an Inquisitorial Priest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: CRF is the power to change reality...
root.m_Talk_DEU: CRF is the power to change reality...
root.m_Talk_FRA: CRF is the power to change reality...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If one looks at it with another perspective, it also means the influence that an individual has on the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If one looks at it with another perspective, it also means the influence that an individual has on the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If one looks at it with another perspective, it also means the influence that an individual has on the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, no matter if one is a Counter, it is highly unlikely that their CRF output will change.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, no matter if one is a Counter, it is highly unlikely that their CRF output will change.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, no matter if one is a Counter, it is highly unlikely that their CRF output will change.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: So what? Are you trying to pick a fight with me over having a lower grade than you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So what? Are you trying to pick a fight with me over having a lower grade than you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So what? Are you trying to pick a fight with me over having a lower grade than you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are wrong, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are wrong, Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are wrong, Sister Looper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because the human mind is always growing, and stereotypes will eventually be shattered.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because the human mind is always growing, and stereotypes will eventually be shattered.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because the human mind is always growing, and stereotypes will eventually be shattered.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's that supposed to mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's that supposed to mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's that supposed to mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Counter's capability is not all about their CRF output.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Counter's capability is not all about their CRF output.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Counter's capability is not all about their CRF output.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So for now, I urge you to learn, feel, and experience more.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So for now, I urge you to learn, feel, and experience more.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So for now, I urge you to learn, feel, and experience more.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For changing the reality that you will face... is entirely up to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For changing the reality that you will face... is entirely up to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For changing the reality that you will face... is entirely up to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What should I do...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What should I do...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What should I do...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what's going on, but... Sister Luce seemed really upset...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what's going on, but... Sister Luce seemed really upset...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what's going on, but... Sister Luce seemed really upset...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure Sister Looper had something to do with it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure Sister Looper had something to do with it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure Sister Looper had something to do with it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...! Maybe I should go apologize on behalf of Sister Looper like I always do...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...! Maybe I should go apologize on behalf of Sister Looper like I always do...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...! Maybe I should go apologize on behalf of Sister Looper like I always do...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But seeing how furious she looked, I don't think a simple apology will resolve the situation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But seeing how furious she looked, I don't think a simple apology will resolve the situation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But seeing how furious she looked, I don't think a simple apology will resolve the situation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, what else should I do? I wish they would stop fighting and get along with each other...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, what else should I do? I wish they would stop fighting and get along with each other...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, what else should I do? I wish they would stop fighting and get along with each other...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder if there is a good solution to this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder if there is a good solution to this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder if there is a good solution to this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's... a Christmas tree?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's... a Christmas tree?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's... a Christmas tree?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, long time no see, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, long time no see, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, long time no see, Sister Nelson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you were deeply injured from your last sacred mission. Are you now fit to be reinstated?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you were deeply injured from your last sacred mission. Are you now fit to be reinstated?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you were deeply injured from your last sacred mission. Are you now fit to be reinstated?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your concerns, Sister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your concerns, Sister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your concerns, Sister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm all better now. It's all thanks to the blessing of the merciful Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm all better now. It's all thanks to the blessing of the merciful Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm all better now. It's all thanks to the blessing of the merciful Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But this tree...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But this tree...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But this tree...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Christmas is just around the corner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Christmas is just around the corner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Christmas is just around the corner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since everyone at the Investigation Council is busy with sacred missions, I thought I'd bring a bit of holiday spirits to the place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since everyone at the Investigation Council is busy with sacred missions, I thought I'd bring a bit of holiday spirits to the place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since everyone at the Investigation Council is busy with sacred missions, I thought I'd bring a bit of holiday spirits to the place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone should be happy on Christmas, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone should be happy on Christmas, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone should be happy on Christmas, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. Come to think of it, I can't believe it's already that time of the year again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. Come to think of it, I can't believe it's already that time of the year again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. Come to think of it, I can't believe it's already that time of the year again.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Because of the sudden Counterside Effect that erupted last year
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Because of the sudden Counterside Effect that erupted last year
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Because of the sudden Counterside Effect that erupted last year
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Sister Nelson? What
8ks wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Sister Nelson? What
8ks wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Sister Nelson? What
8ks wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, that's it! Christmas!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, that's it! Christmas!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, that's it! Christmas!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought of a brilliant solution to reconcile the two Sisters thanks to you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought of a brilliant solution to reconcile the two Sisters thanks to you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought of a brilliant solution to reconcile the two Sisters thanks to you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The two Sisters? Reconcile? What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The two Sisters? Reconcile? What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The two Sisters? Reconcile? What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you! This, too, must be a blessing from the Lord!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you! This, too, must be a blessing from the Lord!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you! This, too, must be a blessing from the Lord!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, happy holidays! Merry Christmas! There is something that I must attend to, so...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, happy holidays! Merry Christmas! There is something that I must attend to, so...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, happy holidays! Merry Christmas! There is something that I must attend to, so...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Nelson...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Nelson...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Nelson...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's too early to be saying "Merry Christmas"...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's too early to be saying "Merry Christmas"...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's too early to be saying "Merry Christmas"...
